violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Clean dish shelving and refrigerator interior noted not in good repair.

MILK AND NONDAIRY PRODUCTS (1 pts): Milk nozzle noted too long. Milk dispenser nozzles should be cut at less than 1 inch of length and at a 45 degree angle to allow the milk in the nozzle to fully drain after each use. If not cut properly the milk will hold in the nozzle and become too warm between uses.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interior noted in need of cleaning.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Unwrapped utensils noted being offered in such a way that the lip or food portion must be touched to obtain the utensil. | STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Clean dishes noted stored on an absorbent surface to dry.
